description_long: This object is a detailed representation of a slipper lobster, featuring a broad, flattened body with a rough, mottled exoskeleton in shades of reddish-brown and orange. The cephalothorax is wide and shield-like, tapering into a segmented abdomen with a fan-shaped tail. Prominent, short antennae extend from the front, while the eyes are set close together on the head. The legs are slender and jointed, with several visible on each side, and the front appendages are robust but lack large claws. The surface texture appears rough and bumpy, with subtle color variations and speckling that mimic the natural camouflage of this marine crustacean.
description: A broad, rough-textured slipper lobster with a mottled reddish-brown exoskeleton, short antennae, and multiple slender legs.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the body, segmented tail, and the arrangement of legs and antennae.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the wide, shield-like cephalothorax and the symmetrical arrangement of legs and tail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the body profile, segmented abdomen, and the curvature of the tail.
description_view_3: Frontal view emphasizing the broad head, short antennae, and the close-set eyes.
